metadata.title: Shanghai Collegiate Touhou Alliance - Touhou Project
metadata.description: Official website of the Shanghai Collegiate Touhou Alliance — connecting Touhou Project fans across universities in Shanghai, fostering fan creation and exchange.

hero.description: Located in the literal promised land of Shanghai Alice (pun intended), the Shanghai Collegiate Touhou Alliance connects Touhou Project enthusiasts across universities, fostering doujin creation and sharing the magic of Gensokyo.
hero.highlight1: Gensokyo's gates are open to all
hero.middle: — not just Shanghai university students, we welcome
hero.descEnd: . Whether you're a student, professional, or indie creator, there's a danmaku world here for you!

about.title: About
about.intro: Founded in November 2023, the Shanghai Collegiate Touhou Alliance bridges Touhou Project fans across Shanghai's universities.
about.libraryDesc: We've curated event planning templates for Touhou fan gatherings, helping university clubs organise engaging activities. You can contribute your own ideas too!
about.followDesc: Follow us on Bilibili for the latest event footage and Touhou content, or visit our GitHub to suggest improvements and help make the Alliance even better!

contact.title: Join Us
contact.desc: Whether you're a veteran Touhou player or just discovering Gensokyo, you're welcome to join us! Let's explore this wonderful world of danmaku together!
contact.scanQr: Scan to join the Shanghai Collegiate Touhou Alliance

library.pageDesc: Planning templates for university Touhou clubs, covering games, competitions, meetups and more — helping organise vibrant doujin events.
library.contributeDesc: Have a great event idea? Share your plan and help other Touhou clubs create even more exciting activities, spreading Touhou culture across campuses!
library.noBlueprintsHint: We're putting together more exciting event plans. Check back soon.
library.notFoundHint: The event plan you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

footer.orgDesc: Connecting Touhou Project fans across Shanghai's universities for creation and exchange.
footer.biliAccount: Bilibili: 上海高校东方联合会

footer.mobileDrawerDesc: Connecting Touhou Project fans across Shanghai's universities for creation and exchange.
